LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT AUDRINA EASON'S MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTION IS DENIED. DEFEANDANT DOES NOT QUALIFY FOR PROTECTION UNDER THE TERMS OF CCP 1161.2(A)5. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN AND CANNOT SHOW THAT THE CRITERIA FOR SEALING SET OUT IN RULES OF COURT 2.550 JUSTIFIES SEALING THE RECORDS ALREADY IN THE PUBLIC DOMAIN. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN, CSR# 10276
